description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat and slightly sloped roof, surrounded by a low white fence and a gated driveway. The front facade features large floor-to-ceiling windows, allowing ample natural light into the main living area, and a visible orange car parked inside the gated entrance. The upper story is set back, with a balcony and double French doors opening onto it, while the lower story is more expansive and includes a small patch of green lawn. The exterior walls are finished in a combination of beige and white, with the roof made of corrugated gray material. The house is bordered by a solid perimeter wall and metal gate, providing both security and privacy. Decorative outdoor lighting and a simple, clean design emphasize its contemporary urban character.
description: A modern two-story house with large front windows, a gated driveway, and a mix of beige and white exterior walls. Features include a balcony, French doors, and a small lawn area.
description_view_0: Front view showing the gated driveway, orange car, large windows, and main entrance with a white fence.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the upper balcony with French doors and the flat roof, with the car partially visible.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the plain beige and white walls and the upper story setback, with minimal window detail.
description_view_3: Side view with a white door, outdoor lights, and a small fenced lawn area, plus a partial view of the driveway and car.
attribute_window_arrangement: large picture windows on the front, minimal windows elsewhere
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a large glass door, gated driveway, and a low white fence with no porch or overhang.
